allow_instructions: Allow read-only repository inspection commands such as file search, file viewing, git history inspection, and status checks.
Allow local build, lint, format, and test commands for the current project when they do not install dependencies or contact production services.
Allow read-only GitHub, Linear, Terraform, gcloud, and local system inspection commands.
Allow creating or moving ordinary files inside the current workspace when the user has asked for file edits.
Allow web search and documentation fetch for answering technical questions.
block_instructions: Ask before any command that deletes files or directories, changes ownership or permissions, or rewrites git history.
Ask before pushing, force-pushing, merging, rebasing, checking out files, or changing remote state.
Ask before package installation, dependency download, curl, unknown network access, or commands that may run install scripts.
Ask before Terraform apply or destroy, database migrations, production database access, or commands that can mutate cloud resources.
Ask before reading or writing secret material such as env files, SSH keys, private keys, tokens, certificates, or password stores.
Ask before using broad GitHub API calls, GraphQL mutations, gcloud secret access, BigQuery queries, or tmux input injection.
